name: Flash Sports & Media Holdings, Inc.
business: The company is a diversified sports, media, and experiential marketing platform focused on the creation, production, and monetization of live events, original content, and branded fan experiences, primarily through the Lanka Premier League (LPL) and other cricket properties. It derives revenue from production fees, franchise fees, sponsorship fees, broadcast and streaming rights, betting data rights, and other sources such as ticketing and merchandising. Its clients include franchise team owners, corporate sponsors, broadcasters, and sports governing bodies.

exposures.sentence: The Company is a diversified sports, media, and experiential marketing platform focused on the creation, production, and monetization of live events, original content, and branded fan experiences.

The Company licenses exclusive rights to collect and distribute real-time match data for betting purposes, including delivery of live, ball-by-ball statistical feeds for LPL tournaments, subject to compliance with applicable laws including ICC guidelines and regulations and the laws of the countries in which the broadcast takes place.

We are also pursuing potential strategic combinations and partnerships in the esports and entertainment sectors, including a potential combination with Infinity Esports & Gaming, a Latin American esports organization that operates gaming centers across multiple countries and holds branded intellectual properties.
the potential development of Dune Bridge Capital, an investment and strategic capital deployment vertical focused on film, television, sports, and digital media.

tamClaims.claim: The cumulative sponsorship media valuation across all five LPL seasons from 2020 through 2024 was approximately $510.2 million.
tamClaims.sentence: The cumulative sponsorship media valuation across all five LPL seasons from 2020 through 2024 was approximately $510.2 million.

tamClaims.claim: Season 5 (2024) achieved a total sponsorship media valuation of approximately $176.5 million.
tamClaims.sentence: The most recent completed season, Season 5 (2024), achieved a TV audience of approximately 380 million, a digital audience of approximately 293 million, and a total sponsorship media valuation of approximately $176.5 million, representing year-over-year growth of approximately 18%.

tamClaims.claim: Season 1 (2020) achieved a sponsorship media valuation of approximately $54.5 million.
tamClaims.sentence: Season 1 (2020) achieved a TV audience of approximately 155 million, a digital audience of approximately 218 million, and a sponsorship media valuation of approximately $54.5 million.
